questions.question: Which of the following agencies launched the ‘Medical Innovations Patent Mitra’ in 2025?
The Constitution (One Hundred and Twenty-Ninth Amendment) Bill, introduced in the Lok Sabha on 17 December 2024, seeks to empower:
questions.option_1: the State to make any special provision for the advancement of the economically weaker section (EWS) of citizens
questions.option_2: the President to declare different proclamations of national emergency on different grounds simultaneously
questions.option_3: the Election Commission to conduct elections for Lok Sabha and all State Assemblies at the same time
questions.option_4: the Parliament to make laws to deal with anti-national activities

questions.question: Who is the chief judge of the Supreme Court of India, as of May 2025?
What significant milestone did India achieve in satellite communication (satcom) as of 21 May 2025?
questions.option_1: Initiated the fastest global rollout of satellite-based communication services
questions.option_2: Banned all foreign satellite communication providers
questions.option_4: Completed the construction of a national space station

questions.question: What was the total number of medals won by India at the 2025 Special Olympics World Winter Games held in Turin, Italy?
What was the name of the bilateral naval exercise held between India and Russia in the Bay of Bengal and Chennai from 28 March to 2 April 2025?
Which Indian organisation is organising a three-day cultural event at New York's Lincoln Center in September 2025 to showcase Indian arts and heritage?
Which cutting‑edge cancer treatment, jointly developed by IIT‑Bombay and Tata Memorial Centre, received DCGI clearance for Phase‑1 trials in December 2024?
The UN Ocean Conference 2025 is scheduled to be held in which city?
Which airline launched its Centre of Digital Innovation in 2025?
India achieved a historic milestone by winning the presidency of which international organisation for the first time through a ballot process?
What was India’s rank on the World Press Freedom Index in 2025, showing improvement from the previous year?
The Waqf (Amendment) Bill, 2025 amended which Act to address issues and challenges in the regulation and management of waqf properties?
Miriyala Apparao, recipient of the Padma Shri (posthumous) in 2025, a pioneering figure in the field of Burrakatha (traditional storytelling), belonged to which Indian state?
Which Indian philanthropist organised a cultural extravaganza at New York's Lincoln Center in 2025?
In 2025, which Indian regulatory body launched the 'Digital India Financial Literacy Mission' to enhance awareness about digital finance and online fraud prevention?
questions.option_1: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)

questions.question: In May 2025, which ISRO mission failed to deploy its Earth observation satellite due to a third-stage anomaly in the PSLV-C61 rocket?
The Defence Ministry’s planned order for 500 Invar anti-tank guided missiles—valued at ₹2,000–3,000 crore—will be placed with which defence Public Sector Unit (PSU)?
Who authored the book ‘PMO: Prime Minister’s Office through the Years’ that was released in May 2025?
How many individuals were conferred the Padma Awards in 2025?
What is the spatial resolution of the Bharat Forecasting System (BFS) launched in May 2025?
Where was the 2025 Southeast Asia Regional Forum of Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) held?
Which country became a full member of BRICS in January 2025?
Announced in 2025, what type of engine is ISRO designing for Next Generation Launch Vehicle (NGLV)?
Where is Wadge Bank, the site of the hydrocarbon exploration project proposed in May 2025 under the Hydrocarbon Exploration and Licensing Policy (HELP) and opposed by fishermen, located?
questions.option_1: A coral atoll close to the Lakshadweep islands in the Indian Ocean
questions.option_2: A submarine plateau about 80 km off the southern coast in the Indian Ocean
questions.option_3: A deep-sea basin around 60 km west of Mumbai in the Arabian Sea
questions.option_4: An offshore reef near the Andaman Islands in the Bay of Bengal region
